title: 日本ダービーの後に・強くなれば

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I did it! Me! I'm the Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that?! This is me! This is the real Gold
City!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Gold City is incredible! She's the real deal... I
hope she gets to wear the winner's sash soon!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Right? Think of how gorgeous she'd look in the
red one! I can't wait for the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe a model can run like that! You're so
cool, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? I'm a Derby champion now. Yet they're still
talking about sashes and modeling...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: But she's an awesome runner, too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So that's how it is?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not that my running is great, but that it's great
"too."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This isn't a win at all. I'm still just a doll to them!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So? What a waste of energy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Because they're all like, "She's not just good looking," or, "She runs well, for a model."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No matter what they say, they always have to
mention my appearance.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's no different than before.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I just want everyone to look at me and see me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But hey, if this is what I get even when I win the
Derby, then maybe... you know...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This is all there is.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: You can still become the strongest of all racers.
You can still become the strongest of all racers.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: The Kikuka Sho...

They say the Kikuka Sho goes to the runner with
the greatest strength. If she shows up big there,
she may be able to rewrite her reputation.
choice_data_list: I don't want things to stay like this either.
I don't want things to stay like this either.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh...
choice_data_list: I want people to recognize your strength!
I want people to recognize your strength!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I just... lost confidence, I guess. But don't
worry, I'm not giving up halfway.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can't let you be more excited about my own
career than I am.
choice_data_list:
We'll use this summer to make you stronger
than ever!

We'll use this summer to make you stronger
than ever!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I'll hold you to that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, I'll make a promise too, to match your
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to get stronger and win the Kikuka Sho.
I'll sear the real me into everyone's minds!
